Summary

Summary of the package

prioritizrdata prioritizrdata-package
prioritizrdata: Conservation Planning Datasets

Data

Data sets distributed with the package

get_tas_pu() get_tas_features()

get_salt_pu() get_salt_features() get_salt_con()

get_wa_pu() get_wa_locked_in() get_wa_locked_out() get_wa_species() get_wa_attr() get_wa_carbon()
